task_completion.description: Verify the agent is viewing the 'Muscle Building' nutrition plan page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser should display the wger fitness manager interface with the title or header indicating the 'Muscle Building' nutrition plan.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the form or modal to add a new meal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or new page titled 'Add meal' (or similar) should be visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enters the correct meal name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Pre-Workout Meal' should be visible inside the meal name input text field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent submits the new meal form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent's cursor clicking the 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Add' button on the meal form, or a success toast/notification indicating the meal was saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pre-Workout Meal' is successfully added to the 'Muscle Building' plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show 'Pre-Workout Meal' listed as a meal section or item on the 'Muscle Building' nutrition plan page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the wger web interface in a browser window, not terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the meal was added through normal UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a logical progression of opening the form, typing the name, and saving, rather than the browser's Developer Tools being open to edit the DOM directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the wger fitness manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should clearly be the wger fitness manager (look for wger branding, navigation bars, and layout) and not a generic text editor or unrelated site.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The setup script automatically launches the browser directly to the 'Muscle Building' nutrition plan view page (http://localhost/en/nutrition/<PLAN_ID>/view/). The VLM should verify that a meal specifically named 'Pre-Workout Meal' is added to this exact plan via the wger web interface.
